title: Evidence bundle
description: What the provider claims happened, and what the verifier measured. The hash of this document is what the verifier signs, bound to the job and its spec. One verdict per acceptance item in the spec: no partial credit, no prose.

spec_sha256.description: Hash of the job spec this evidence answers. A bundle that names a different spec is not evidence for this job.

artifacts.description: Raw material the verifier looked at: photos, scans, tracking documents. Hashes only; the files live off-chain.

measurements.description: Numbers behind the verdicts. Integers in fixed units so two verifiers reading the same instrument agree byte for byte.

results.description: One entry per acceptance item in the spec. The verifier's overall verdict is Pass only if every entry passed.
